suppress.notes: False positive: CVE-2026-54399 and CVE-2026-54428 affect org.apache.httpcomponents.core5:httpcore5 (v5.x line) only. This is the legacy org.apache.httpcomponents:httpcore (v4.x), a different codebase. Confirmed against Apache's own CVE scope and Debian security tracker. Re-evaluate if a v4-specific advisory is ever published.
